flagships.name: OpenScholar
flagships.subtitle: 45M open-access papers · Contriever retriever · synthetic SFT data
flagships.why: Sets the modern bar for evidence-grounded scientific synthesis. Strongest empirical evidence that retrieval can eliminate hallucinated citations.

flagships.name: f-RAG
flagships.subtitle: Fragment-vocabulary retrieval over ZINC250K · drug-like molecule generation
flagships.why: Demonstrates the dominant K2.O3 pattern — curated DB feeds generative model with downstream physical verification.

flagships.name: CLADD
flagships.subtitle: PrimeKG · PubChem · DrugBank · STITCH cross-source · anchor-drug technique
flagships.why: Canonical example of relational knowledge coupling (Requirement #2) — traverses PrimeKG drug-protein-disease links.

flagships.name: MedGraphRAG
flagships.tagline: Triple-tier graph: MIMIC IV + MedC-K + UMLS/ICD
flagships.subtitle: U-Retrieval · evidence-based citations · ★ K1+K2+K4 cross-source
flagships.why: The clearest demonstration of all four K sources working in concert — primary literature, curated ontology, and tacit private EHR.

flagships.name: MITRA
flagships.tagline: Physics collaboration tacit memory · +6× over BM25
flagships.subtitle: CMS Analysis Notes · internal wikis · on-prem 4-bit deployment
flagships.why: Bellwether for K4 tacit knowledge — institutional memory that ChatGPT structurally cannot access.

flagships.name: Patho-AgenticRAG
flagships.subtitle: 600 textbook pages · agentic router · GRPO training · multimodal
flagships.why: Largest gain reported in a peer-reviewed K3 RAG paper; agentic routing over multimodal textbook.

flagships.name: MEDRAG
flagships.subtitle: PubMed + StatPearls + Textbooks + Wikipedia · MedCPT retriever · RRF fusion
flagships.why: Established the source-reliability-tiering benchmark (Requirement #3) — different epistemic weight per corpus.

flagships.name: PaperQA
flagships.subtitle: Paper-grounded retrieve-cite-answer · the K1.O1 reference design
flagships.why: Established mandatory claim attribution (Requirement #1) as the baseline expectation for scientific RAG.

flagships.name: LLaMP
flagships.subtitle: Property lookup · simulation tools · K1+K2 cross-source
flagships.why: Bridges primary literature and the Materials Project KB — sets the K2 materials science pattern.
